subject: flt-ncn: Coverage debt reduction
description: Raise coverage on failing Go packages and web app to meet 80% threshold. Key gaps: graph/resolver (16%), internal/item (22%), internal/user (11%), internal/audit (7%), internal/mcpclient (16%), internal/worker (49%), internal/storage (57%), internal/db (70%), internal/provider (72%). Web: global 71% (pages like ItemDetail 52%, Capture 57%, Browse 61%). Add meaningful tests for real behavior, not wiring-only coverage. Beads ID: flt-ncn.
activeForm: Writing coverage tests for Go packages and web components
